CustomField.label: Expected Value Formula
CustomField.description: Optional, Record formula checks only. A scalar formula whose result is shown as the "Expected" value on the result row (the right side of a comparison — what the record should have had). Leave blank to keep the default behavior (Expected shows the quoted Pass/Fail Formula text). The Pass/Fail Formula still decides pass/fail. Example: BLANKVALUE(Credit_Total__c, 0) - BLANKVALUE(Adjustment__c, 0).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. Scalar formula shown as "Expected" on the row (e.g. BLANKVALUE(Credit_Total__c, 0)). Pass/Fail is still decided by the Pass/Fail Formula. Blank = Expected shows the formula text.
